title: Mobile Developer Intern
description: Developed cross-platform .NET MAUI applications using MVVM architecture for scalability
Designed SQLite relational databases, managing cascading relationships to ensure data integrity
Integrated REST APIs for data features, handling async requests and JSON parsing
Implemented rich UI elements using Syncfusion and CommunityToolkit.Maui to improve usability

Established offline-first data synchronization between local SQLite and cloud backends
Applied clean code practices and Git workflows within a collaborative team environment. Researched Flutter and React Native to expand cross-platform technical knowledge

title: Technical Support
description: Diagnosing and resolving hardware, software, and network problems for users
Creating, modifying, and deactivating user accounts and permissions based on organizational policies and user roles
